verse_text: You have sown much and brought in little. You have eaten, but you are not satisfied. You have drunk, but not to get drunk. You have clothed yourselves, but no one is warm. And he who earns wages, earns wages to put into a bag with holes.'

pericope.title: The Command to Rebuild the Lord's House

links.context: The temple will be rebuilt, but not as it was before. The second temple, not as glorious, was completed in approximately 515 BC (see [[HAG.1:1]]-15).
